title: Telepistons Real Logger
description: Telescopic and Squishy animations for pistons, with a proper logger. 1.19-1.19.2
body:
Adds the telescopic piston arm animation seen in Bedrock Edition to Java! LTS Support for 1.19-1.19.2

Fork of Telepistons that adds:
- Fabric loader 0.16.5 support
- Cleaned up the various files
  - Split things up into smaller methods
- Removes unused files (Reduces file size) 
- Add a proper logger, replacing System.out.println() calls.


Requires Fabric API to run!
